content.json:
# Syslog Traffic — Facility × Severity & Error Bursts
**Theme:** Syslog traffic monitoring · **Data source:** `Syslog`.

Facility/severity breakdown, error-burst timeline, and the processes/hosts generating them.

> Severity set ('err','crit','alert','emerg') is the default error band — adjust per environment.

content.query: Syslog | summarize Events=count() by Facility, SeverityLevel | sort by Events desc
content.title: Facility × severity matrix

content.query: Syslog | where SeverityLevel in ('err', 'crit', 'alert', 'emerg') | summarize Errors=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m), SeverityLevel | render timechart
content.title: Error / critical burst timeline

content.query: Syslog | where SeverityLevel in ('err', 'crit', 'alert', 'emerg') | summarize Errors=count() by ProcessName, Computer | top 100 by Errors desc
content.title: Top processes by error count

content.query: Syslog | summarize Events=count() by Computer, SeverityLevel | sort by Computer asc
content.title: Severity mix per host
